perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a sun hat and a blue off-the-shoulder top stands in front of a large display of bagels in a warehouse-style store, giving a thumbs up. A large Costco logo is superimposed at the top. (2) She points excitedly at the bags of bagels and picks one up to show the camera. (3) The camera focuses on the price tag ($119) and the specific cheese flavor of the bagels. (4) She shows several different stacks of bagels in different flavors including cinnamon raisin and plain. (5) She concludes by giving another thumbs up while holding a bag of cheese bagels.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins speaking in Mandarin over upbeat, poppy background music. (2) The sound of a busy supermarket environment with distant chatter and ambient noise is audible under the narration. (3) The music continues at a steady volume, maintaining an enthusiastic tone throughout the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 新的制度 貝果單賣 一顆只要20元: Hook text indicating a new system for buying bagels individually for $20. (2) 好的制度又一個: Emotional caption expressing approval of the new system. (3) 單包購買: Functional text highlighting that single bags can now be purchased. (4) 119元: Functional text showing the price per bag. (5) 超值得 / 好划算喔: Emotional captions emphasizing the high value and good deal.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Demo -> Price Breakdown -> Flavor Showcase

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 male shoppers in the background, 1 female shopper in the distance.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with short dark hair, wearing a grey sun hat, a navy blue off-the-shoulder ruffle top, and ripped blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, metal shelving, wooden pallets stacked with bags of bagels, and price tags hanging above the products.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform viewers about a shopping policy change at Costco Taiwan, specifically that bagels can now be purchased in single six-count bags rather than the previous requirement of buying two bags, highlighting the cost-effectiveness and convenience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is showcasing a specific product and price at a specific retailer, praising the value and new purchasing system.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High energy delivery with expressive hand gestures and heavy use of vibrant text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets budget-conscious shoppers and Costco members in Taiwan, leveraging a 'life hack' style of content common in consumer-advice vlogs.
